title: Class Suspension Notice
short_description: All classes will remain suspended tomorrow.
description: Due to scheduled maintenance work in the main building, all classes will remain suspended tomorrow. Students are advised to check the portal for updated schedules.

title: Assignment Submission Deadline
short_description: Submit your React assignment before 10th April.
description: Students must submit their React.js assignment through the LMS before 10th April 2026. Late submissions will not be accepted without prior approval.

title: New Classroom Added
short_description: A new classroom has been added for batch 2025.
description: A new smart classroom has been allocated for Batch 2025 on the 3rd floor. It is equipped with projectors and high-speed internet for better learning experience.

title: Exam Routine Published
short_description: Midterm exam routine is now available.
description: The midterm examination routine has been published on the student portal. Students are advised to download the routine and prepare accordingly.

title: Holiday Notice
short_description: Institute will remain closed on Friday.
description: The institute will remain closed on Friday due to a national holiday. Regular activities will resume from the next working day.
